_meta.source: NCAP Study Two (Apr 2024) Appendix 2; SAC045; SAC068; DITL/ITHI.

corporate.reason: Forest root in large multi-national AD deployments.

ad.reason: Active Directory shorthand; high DITL query volume.

domain.reason: Legacy NT domain label in root queries.

server.reason: Generic server label; high SMB leakage.

mgmt.reason: Management network label in enterprise networks.

dev.reason: Development environment — widely used as private TLD.

infra.reason: Infrastructure zone; common in DevOps environments.

private.reason: Explicitly private namespace — high collision risk.

intra.reason: Short-form intranet; documented in NCAP leakage data.
